meaning: The devil. The most common and versatile Swedish swear word.
cultural_context: Used exactly like 'fuck' or 'damn' to express frustration, but is considered very mild today. Frequently heard on daytime television.
example_usage: Vad fan gör du? (What the fuck / devil are you doing?)

meaning: Hell. Used as a strong exclamation of anger.
cultural_context: An angry shout when something goes terribly wrong, like missing a train.
example_usage: Helvete också! (Hell too! / Bloody hell!)

meaning: Plural of devil (djävul). Used as a strong exclamation or an intensifier.
cultural_context: An essential building block of Swedish swearing. Saying 'Jävlar!' implies surprise or pain.
example_usage: Jävlar vad kallt! (Damn / devils how cold!)

meaning: The adjectival form of 'jävel/djävul'.
cultural_context: The Swedish equivalent of inserting completely seamlessly 'fucking' into any sentence.
example_usage: Din jävla idiot. (You fucking idiot.)

meaning: Satan. Used as an exclamation of pain or anger.
cultural_context: Has a sharp, aggressive sound in Swedish.
example_usage: Satan vad ont det gör! (Satan how much that hurts!)

meaning: Feces. Note the 'sk' is pronounced similar to 'sh' in English.
cultural_context: Very commonly used as an intensifier prefix for both good and bad things (e.g., 'skitbra' = shit good / very good).
example_usage: Det är helt skit. (It is completely shit.)

meaning: A person who acts terribly towards others.
cultural_context: A classic, universally understood insult for a mean or selfish person.
example_usage: Din jävla skitstövel! (You fucking shit-boot!)

meaning: Female genitalia. One of the absolute strongest and most taboo native Swedish swear words.
cultural_context: Highly offensive. Used to violently insult a woman or express extreme outrage.
example_usage: Håll käften, din fitta. (Shut your mouth, you cunt.)

meaning: Prostitute. A very severe slur.
cultural_context: Like 'fitta', this is a heavily stigmatized, aggressive insult aimed almost exclusively at degrading women.
example_usage: Jävla hora. (Fucking whore.)

meaning: Male genitalia.
cultural_context: Vulgar term. Can be used as a standalone curse or an insult ('kukhuvud' = cock head).
example_usage: Kuk också! (Cock too! / Fuck it!)

meaning: Someone whose head is a penis.
cultural_context: Exactly equivalent to calling someone a dickhead in English.
example_usage: Vilket kukhuvud. (What a dickhead.)

meaning: The anus. Used to call someone a terrible person.
cultural_context: A direct translation of the English concept. Very common.
example_usage: Han är ett riktigt rövhål. (He is a real asshole.)

meaning: The vulgar verb for sexual intercourse. (Note: The 'k' is occasionally silent in some dialects, but usually pronounced softly: k-nool-a).
cultural_context: Used mostly literally for sex, not as a general exclamation. You can't say 'Knulla dig!' to mean 'Fuck you!' in Swedish.
example_usage: Jag vill knulla. (I want to fuck.)

meaning: Originally a neutral slur for a homosexual man, but often weaponized as an insult by school children.
cultural_context: Can be reclaimed by the LGBTQ community (e.g., 'bögklubb' = gay club), but when used maliciously, it is a homophobic slur.
example_usage: Jävla bög. (Fucking faggot.)

meaning: A homosexual man combined with 'devil'.
cultural_context: The '-jävel' suffix turns any noun into a hostile slur. This is severe hate speech.
example_usage: [Homophobic slur omitted in translation directly, context recognized]

meaning: A direct command to perform fellatio.
cultural_context: A highly aggressive American-style insult adopted by younger Swedes.
example_usage: Sug min kuk, kompis. (Suck my dick, buddy.)

meaning: An abbreviation of Cerebral Palsy, used derogatorily to mean mentally or physically disabled.
cultural_context: An extremely common and wildly offensive schoolyard insult from the 90s/00s.
example_usage: Är du helt CP eller? (Are you completely retarded or what?)

meaning: Someone severely lacking in intelligence or acting absurdly.
cultural_context: A longer, harsher form of calling someone 'CP'.
example_usage: Han är fan cp-skadad. (He is fucking brain-damaged.)

meaning: A child assigned to 'särskola' (special education for intellectual disabilities).
cultural_context: A deeply insulting and mean-spirited way to call someone hopelessly stupid.
example_usage: Du beter dig som ett särbarn. (You're acting like a special ed kid.)

meaning: Derogatory term historically linked to Down syndrome.
cultural_context: Functions similarly to 'CP' as an ableist slur for idiocy.
example_usage: Vilket jävla mongo. (What a fucking retard.)

meaning: A milder, childish word for feces.
cultural_context: Not truly a swear word, but used by children to insult each other ('bajskorv' = poop sausage).
example_usage: Bajs också! (Poop too!)

meaning: The child-friendly version of skitstövel.
cultural_context: Completely harmless. Used in children's television.
example_usage: Din bajstövel! (You poop-boot!)

meaning: Something that has been cursed by God.
cultural_context: A slightly old-fashioned but very forceful expression of anger.
example_usage: Det är så förbannat kallt. (It's so damned cold.)

meaning: To tell someone to go to Hell.
cultural_context: A classic, universally understood command to leave you alone.
example_usage: Dra åt helvete, gubbjävel! (Go to hell, old bastard!)

meaning: An older man.
cultural_context: Not inherently a swear word, but often used dismissively.
example_usage: Flytta på dig, gubbe. (Move over, old man.)

meaning: A mean, stubborn, or annoying older man.
cultural_context: The '-jävel' suffix makes this a harsh, hostile insult.
example_usage: Den där snåla gubbjäveln. (That stingy old bastard.)

meaning: An older woman, or a disparaging term for a wife.
cultural_context: Can mean a complaining, bitter woman. Highly disrespectful.
example_usage: Din sura kärring. (You sour old hag.)

meaning: A severely elevated insult against an older woman.
cultural_context: Adding the devil suffix (jävel) maximizes the hostility.
example_usage: Håll käften, kärringjävel! (Shut up, old fucking bitch!)

meaning: A misbehaving, annoying youth.
cultural_context: Often yelled by older people at teenagers skating on the sidewalk.
example_usage: Försvinn, din snorunge. (Disappear, you snot-nosed brat.)

meaning: A minced oath dating back to folklore where saying numbers summoned demons.
cultural_context: Completely child-friendly. Used by grandmothers.
example_usage: Attans också! (Darn it all!)

meaning: Another minced oath based on a cursed number.
cultural_context: Very quaint. Sounds like 'Oh fuzzy pickles' in English.
example_usage: För sjutton gubbar! (For seventeen old men! / For heaven's sake!)

meaning: Short for 'tusen djävlar' (a thousand devils), now a soft curse.
cultural_context: Often used in Donald Duck comics.
example_usage: Fy tusan! (Oh darn!)

meaning: A pig. A person devoid of morals.
cultural_context: Calling a man a 'svin' means he is predatory, abusive, or absolutely repulsive.
example_usage: Han är ett jävla svin. (He is a fucking pig.)

meaning: An idiot.
cultural_context: Pronounced with a long 'o'. A standard, sharp insult.
example_usage: Vilken idiot. (What an idiot.)

meaning: Derived from a famous Swedish chocolate milk brand. Means a slightly lovable but clumsy fool.
cultural_context: Very gentle. Used between friends when someone drops their keys.
example_usage: Du är ett riktigt pucko. (You are a real dummy.)

meaning: A highly aggressive way to tell someone to stop talking.
cultural_context: 'Käft' means an animal's jaw. Telling a human to hold their jaw equates them to a barking dog.
example_usage: Håll käften på dig! (Shut your fucking mouth!)

meaning: Someone working against the public good.
cultural_context: A slightly melodramatic, Ibsen-esque insult.
example_usage: Han är en oförskämd fiende till folket. (He's an insolent enemy of the people.)

english_equivalent: Satan's fucking hell / Motherfucking godamm shit
meaning: A continuous chain of all three major Swedish religious curses.
cultural_context: Used when enduring extreme physical pain or a catastrophic failure.
example_usage: Satans jävla helvete, jag bröt benet! (Satan's fucking hell, I broke my leg!)

meaning: Someone who sycophantically favors the boss.
cultural_context: Sweden's flat corporate culture hates 'rövslickare'.
example_usage: Han är chefens rövslickare. (He is the boss's ass-kisser.)

english_equivalent: anal-retentive / stuck up / needing a shit
meaning: Literally means you desperately need to poop. Metaphorically means someone is acting incredibly stiff, nervous, or overly formal.
cultural_context: A brilliant descriptive word for a bureaucrat or an anxious rule-follower.
example_usage: Var inte så jävla skitnödig. (Don't be so fucking anal-retentive/stiff.)

word: huvudet upp i röven (hoo-vood-et oop ee ruv-en)
meaning: Someone who is completely ignorant of reality.
cultural_context: Direct translation from English phrasing, widely adopted.
example_usage: Han har huvudet upp i röven. (He has his head up his ass.)

meaning: The censored, polite version of 'jävla'.
cultural_context: Safe to use around children.
example_usage: Din jäkla buse. (You freaking ruffian.)

meaning: Urine/piss.
cultural_context: Used to describe bad beer or terrible weather ('pissväder').
example_usage: Det regnar piss. (It's raining piss / terribly.)

meaning: A promiscuous woman.
cultural_context: Slightly more archaic than hora, but still highly offensive 'slut shaming'.
example_usage: Din billiga slampa. (You cheap slut.)

meaning: A rapist.
cultural_context: While it's a legal term, weaponizing it in an argument is a severe, life-ruining accusation rather than a casual swear word.
example_usage: Han är ett jävla as, en våldtäktsman. (He's a fucking corpse/scum, a rapist.)

meaning: A rotting animal carcass. Used to describe someone with no morals or humanity.
cultural_context: Also used as a prefix intensifier (e.g., 'asbra' = carcass-good / really good, or 'asfull' = dead drunk).
example_usage: Ditt jävla as! (You fucking carcass/scum!)

meaning: A slang term for vagina. Milder than fitta.
cultural_context: More conversational or comedic, less violently insulting.
example_usage: Klia sig i muttan. (Scratch her muff.)

meaning: Breasts. Derived from the teats of an animal.
cultural_context: A crude, colloquial way for men to discuss women's chests.
example_usage: Schyssta pattar. (Nice tits.)

meaning: To masturbate (male).
cultural_context: Direct equivalent to 'wank'.
example_usage: Han sitter hemma och runkar. (He sits at home and wanks.)

meaning: Describes a situation where people are just flattering each other needlessly.
cultural_context: Swedish corporate slang for a useless meeting.
example_usage: Vilket jävla runkrunk-möte. (What a fucking circlejerk meeting.)

meaning: Your mom.
cultural_context: A popular comeback among younger generations, often mimicking American English.
example_usage: Vem bryr sig? Din mamma. (Who cares? Your mom.)

meaning: Someone who sucks ass.
cultural_context: Creative compounding to create a demeaning insult.
example_usage: Din lilla sugröv. (You little suck-ass.)

meaning: A complete disaster.
cultural_context: A journalist's favorite word for a failed political campaign. Not vulgar, just damning.
example_usage: Vilket jävla fiasko. (What a fucking disaster.)

meaning: A foolish person.
cultural_context: Extremely archaic and polite. Used lovingly by grandparents.
example_usage: Åh din lilla dumbom. (Oh you little dummy.)

meaning: Someone who constantly drops things or acts clumsily.
cultural_context: Replaces actual swear words when you accidentally break a glass.
example_usage: Jag är en riktig klantskalle. (I'm a real clumsy idiot.)

meaning: Borrowed directly from English.
cultural_context: Swedes, especially youth, use 'bitch' frequently. Since it is foreign, it lacks the deep taboo of 'fitta' or 'hora'.
example_usage: Hon är en riktig bitch. (She is a real bitch.)

meaning: The English word 'fuck'.
cultural_context: Ubiquitous in Sweden. Swedes do not censor English curse words. State television broadcasts 'fuck' uncensored.
example_usage: Åh fuck, jag glömde! (Oh fuck, I forgot!)

meaning: Nonsense.
cultural_context: Used exactly as in English.
example_usage: Det är ju bara bullshit. (That's just bullshit.)

meaning: Arabic/Kurdish word for prostitute, imported into modern Swedish street slang (Ortenspråk).
cultural_context: Extremely prevalent among youth in Swedish suburbs. Spelled variously as kahba, qahpa, keffa. Considered a severe insult to a woman's honor in immigrant communities.
example_usage: Jävla qahpa. (Fucking whore.)

meaning: Turkish for mirror, historically meaning detectives. Now the universal Swedish street slang for police.
cultural_context: Not inherently a classic curse, but 'Aina kommer' (The pigs are coming) is shouted by gangs. Highly anti-authoritarian.
example_usage: Fuck aina! (Fuck the police!)

meaning: A 1960s/70s slang term for sexual intercourse.
cultural_context: More jovial and slightly gross, akin to 'shag' rather than 'fuck'.
example_usage: Ska vi göka? (Shall we shag?)

meaning: A homeless vagabond soaked in urine.
cultural_context: A surprisingly poetic and deeply degrading insult for someone who is useless or looks terrible.
example_usage: Din jävla pissluffare. (You fucking piss hobo.)

meaning: Modern Ortenspråk slang for a girl.
cultural_context: Can be neutral ('min guzz' = my girl) or derogatory ('en billig guzz' = a cheap chick) depending on the speaker's tone.
example_usage: Kolla in den guzzen. (Check out that chick.)

meaning: Ortenspråk slang for a male.
cultural_context: Used to denote a guy, sometimes disrespectfully. 'Den där shunon' (That guy/fucker).
example_usage: Vem är shunon? (Who is that dude?)

meaning: Someone so stupid they probably just stand outside a kiosk staring at the wall.
cultural_context: A beloved, highly creative, but ultimately ableist Swedish insult.
example_usage: Släpp in mig, ditt kioskmongo! (Let me in, you kiosk-idiot!)

meaning: A person whose brain takes a long time to process simple information.
cultural_context: A polite but firm way to call someone stupid in a professional setting.
example_usage: Är du trögtänkt, eller? (Are you dense, or what?)

meaning: Someone whose skull is made of cheap cardboard, hence empty.
cultural_context: A fun, highly descriptive insult. Classic Swedish compounding.
example_usage: Vänd om bilen, pappskalle! (Turn the car around, cardboard skeleton!)

meaning: A freak or someone acting incredibly bizarrely.
cultural_context: Popularized by a Swedish movie of the same name. Short for 'missfoster' (deformity).
example_usage: Vilket jävla miffo. (What a fucking weirdo.)

meaning: A deeply offensive word for someone deformed or acting horribly.
cultural_context: The longer, nastier version of miffo. Equivalent to calling someone a failed abortion.
example_usage: Kolla på honom, ett riktigt missfoster. (Look at him, a real freak.)

meaning: A man who is dirty, poorly dressed, and unkempt.
cultural_context: Often aimed at men who drink cheap beer on park benches, or lazy housemates.
example_usage: Din lata slusk. (You lazy slob.)

meaning: A face that looks like a vagina.
cultural_context: A vicious, hostile personal attack.
example_usage: Försvinn, ditt fittnylle. (Disappear, you cunt-face.)

meaning: An extremely old euphemism/minced oath.
cultural_context: Comedic. Only used by hipsters ironically or 90-year-olds.
example_usage: Järnspikar, vad dyrt! (Iron nails, how expensive!)

meaning: Contraction of 'Vad fan'. Used to express shock or annoyance.
cultural_context: The absolute most common spoken exclamation in Sweden when confused.
example_usage: Vafan gör du? (Wtf are you doing?)

meaning: A softer, TV-safe deformation of helvete.
cultural_context: Common in older Swedish cinema.
example_usage: För helskotta! (For heaven's sake!)

meaning: An annoying child.
cultural_context: Very common for parents to mutter under their breath or yell at teens.
example_usage: Kom ner från taket, din jävla skitunge! (Come down from the roof, you fucking little shit!)

meaning: The noun form of the devil. A bastard.
cultural_context: Can be used affectionately ('din lilla jävel' = you little devil) or aggressively ('din sjuka jävel' = you sick bastard).
example_usage: Du är en smart jävel. (You're a smart bastard.)

meaning: Begging for hell's sake.
cultural_context: The exact structural translation and emotional equivalent of 'for fuck's sake'.
example_usage: Skynda dig för helvete! (Hurry up for fuck's sake!)

meaning: Arabic word used extensively in Swedish Ortenspråk to mean 'hurry up'.
cultural_context: Not a swear word, but a ubiquitous piece of modern Swedish slang culture.
example_usage: Yallah, vi drar! (Come on, let's leave!)

meaning: Ortenspråk for something that is bad, boring, or low quality.
cultural_context: Very common in youth slang. Replaces 'dålig' (bad).
example_usage: Den där filmen var helt keff. (That movie was totally wack/shitty.)

meaning: Someone whose head is full of urine.
cultural_context: A creative alternative to kukhuvud.
example_usage: Vilket jävla pisshuvud. (What a fucking piss-head.)

meaning: The dregs of society. Alcoholics, criminals, or generally awful people.
cultural_context: A harsh judgment on someone's lifestyle.
example_usage: Bara massa drägg på den baren. (Only a bunch of scum at that bar.)
